base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of guy_moveset — a character (playable) from 1989 final fight. Guy — Bushin-ryu ninjutsu. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Guy — Bushin-ryu ninjutsu; elbow-combo + wall-jump + run-dash. Fast but weak
